input_preview: i want to build a digital business card for my healthy meal brand "Slaylad" you can see www.slaylad.; if i commit in my github, will it update on vercel ?
output_preview:
Yes—if your GitHub repository is connected to the Vercel project.

Run:

```bash
git add .
git commit -m "Update Slaylad digital card"
git push origin main
```

Vercel will then automatically:

- Depl
